% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for esr_cdf
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyOne\else\newif\ifShowStrategyOne\ShowStrategyOnetrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyTwo\else\newif\ifShowStrategyTwo\ShowStrategyTwotrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyThree\else\newif\ifShowStrategyThree\ShowStrategyThreetrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyFour\else\newif\ifShowStrategyFour\ShowStrategyFourtrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyFive\else\newif\ifShowStrategyFive\ShowStrategyFivetrue\fi
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={ESR [bit/s/Hz]},
    ylabel={CDF},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
  ]
    \ifShowStrategyOne
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=CentralMassiveMimoColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy1}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyTwo
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy2}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyThree
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy3}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFour
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy4}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFive
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy5}
    \fi
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
